summary: CV Family & Schooling census — enrichment (~20-field schema, Sonnet workers, 1 site visit + 1 search)
logs: Batch 4: enriching 40 family/schooling entities (Sonnet 4.6, 1 site visit + 1 search)...

enrichment.name: Trinity Lutheran Child Development Center
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Center is permanently closed; aggregators (childcarecenter.us, Yelp, Nextdoor) still index it with capacity/license data, but the organization no longer operates.

enrichment.name: Indio Learning Village
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Facility licensed since 1994 with 30-child capacity but has no own website; only surfaces through aggregator directories (Yelp, Winnie, childcarecenter.us, YP, Nextdoor).

enrichment.name: All About Kids Child Care
enrichment.ages_grades_served: infant–age 11 (0–6 months, 6 months–3 years, 3–5 years, 7–11 years)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Operates since 2006 with positive Yelp reviews, but own website is dead (ECONNREFUSED); presence limited to aggregators (Yelp, Winnie, Yellow Pages, Sulekha) with no authoritative owned web presence.

enrichment.name: Bright Stars Daycare LLC
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: No live website (Google Business site returns 404); all search results are aggregators — the business is effectively invisible to AI agents and search crawlers.

enrichment.name: Parkside Daycare
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Aggregators (Care.com, Yelp, Daycare.com, Yahoo Local) dominate search results; own site and CDSS license number surface but own brand presence is thin for a licensed, actively enrolled center.

enrichment.name: New Horizon Childcare
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Website unreachable (ECONNREFUSED); entity surfaces only via Care.com and childcarecenter.us aggregators — no own-site presence in search results.

enrichment.name: Grace Academy Christian School
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: No own website detected; school surfaces only through third-party aggregators (Trulia, MilitaryTownAdvisor) — zero direct web presence despite being an operational K-8 campus.

enrichment.name: Indian Wells Tennis Garden Junior Programs
enrichment.ages_grades_served: ages 4–18 (clinics/lessons all skill levels; structured programs ages 7–12 and 13+)
enrichment._src_name: Indian Wells Tennis Garden Junior Programs

enrichment.name: NJTL Coachella Valley
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Organization has multi-decade history (est. 1995), USTA affiliation, and community reach serving financially disadvantaged youth valley-wide, but website is unreachable and online presence is thin relative to that standing.
enrichment._src_name: NJTL Coachella Valley (National Junior Tennis & Learning)

enrichment.name: The Academy at IWGR
enrichment.full_address: 44-500 Indian Wells Lane, Indian Wells, CA 92210
enrichment.ages_grades_served: youth and adults, all ages and skill levels
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Academy program surfaces mainly under the resort brand; no dedicated directory or third-party listings specifically for the academy name.
enrichment._src_name: The Academy at IWGR (Indian Wells Golf Resort)

enrichment.name: Accel Therapies
enrichment.ages_grades_served: ages 2–8 (pre-school focus; early childhood through adulthood implied)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Own site ranks in search but results are dominated by Yelp, aggregators (Beaming Health, Chamber of Commerce, uscity.net), and directories rather than authoritative health or therapy sources.

enrichment.name: Southwest Christian Academy
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Own site accessible and indexed, but top results dominated by daycare.com, Winnie, and Yelp aggregators rather than the school's own content.

enrichment.name: Moore Tennis Academy at Desert Princess
enrichment.full_address: 28555 Landau Blvd, Cathedral City, CA 92234 (Desert Princess Country Club)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Surfaces mainly via USTA TennisLink tournament listings and ACTIVEkids aggregator rather than its own branded presence; no structured data aids discoverability.
enrichment._src_name: Moore Tennis Academy at Desert Princess

enrichment.name: Desert Aquaventures
enrichment.full_address: 68174 Desert View Road, Cathedral City, CA 92234
enrichment.license_or_accreditation_displayed: American Red Cross WSI (Water Safety Instructor) certification
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established since 2013 with strong Yelp reviews and regional recognition, but surfaces primarily through aggregators (Yelp, Yahoo Local, Nextdoor) rather than authoritative local press or directory placements.

enrichment.name: Coachella Valley Infant Swim
enrichment.full_address: Dinah Shore & Date Palm, Cathedral City, CA 92234
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Own site accessible and Yelp present with 17 reviews, but no press, community, or directory coverage beyond basic aggregators — consistent with visibility level for a solo instructor operation.

enrichment.name: Gregoire Combatives
enrichment.full_address: 35887 Date Palm Dr, Cathedral City, CA 92234
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: School operating since 1997 with community reviews on Yelp, Nextdoor, and Facebook, but no structured data and no pricing transparency limits agent-surfacing potential.

enrichment.name: CVRep Conservatory
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 68510 E. Palm Canyon Drive, Cathedral City, CA 92234
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: CVRep surfaces well as a theater venue but its Conservatory education arm is not distinctly indexed — education queries return the main theater brand, not the conservatory program.

enrichment.name: Tools For Tomorrow
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: Programs at Rio Vista Elementary School, Cathedral City, CA (admin office: 42600 Cook Street, Suite 202, Palm Desert, CA 92211)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Serves 15+ school sites and 16,000+ children across Coachella Valley but barely surfaces in local search beyond its own domain — no authoritative regional press or directory coverage found.

enrichment.name: The Conservatory at CVRep
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 68510 E. Palm Canyon Drive, Cathedral City, CA 92234

enrichment.name: Desert Insight
enrichment.full_address: 35-325 Date Palm Drive, Suite 122, Cathedral City, CA
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site surfaces in top results for branded queries but does not appear in aggregator networks (Psychology Today, Yelp, Care.com) for category-level searches; bilingual specialization is a notable gap in area-wide discoverability.

enrichment.name: First School of the Desert
enrichment.ages_grades_served: ages 2–6 (preschool children between the ages of two years and six years)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 1990 with 30+ years of operation and 91 students served, but top search results are dominated by aggregators (Yelp, Winnie, CareLuLu) with no authoritative independent coverage surfacing.

enrichment.name: Kingdom Kids Childcare
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Accepts Riverside County subsidized programs suggesting established community relationships, but street address not published and online presence is thin beyond own site and Yelp.

enrichment.name: Young Life Desert Cities
enrichment.full_address: unknown — no standalone physical campus; clubs meet at partner schools across the Coachella Valley
enrichment.ages_grades_served: middle school (WyldLife) and high school (Young Life); roughly grades 6–12
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Multi-school footprint spanning Cathedral City to Coachella with active summer camps, but search surfaces only own subpages and no authoritative third-party coverage.

enrichment.name: Green Room Theatre Company
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 1515 Sixth Street (Coachella City Hall), Coachella, CA 92236 (mailing: PO Box 103, Coachella, CA 92236)
enrichment.ages_grades_served: youth all-ages (elementary through high school; children, teens, and adults)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 2010 nonprofit with California Arts Council grant recognition and multi-community touring reach; online presence is proportionally strong for its size.

enrichment.name: CVHC Ballet Folklorico Classes
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: Las Palmeras Estates, Coachella, CA (no street address displayed)
special_programs_if_stated: cultural enrichment through music and dance
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Community-serving nonprofit program for low-income farmworker families with multiple active class sites; surfaces only on own domain in search — no press, directory, or aggregator coverage found.

enrichment.name: Raices Cultura
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.ages_grades_served: youth all-ages (youth + adults; specific programs target high school students, boys and men of color, women and girls)
special_programs_if_stated: Día de Los Muertos community arts
Boys and Men of Color program
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: 20-year community anchor with Coachella Festival installations, ACTA recognition, and Anderson Children's Foundation backing — surfaces only modestly in search; no Google Knowledge Panel or prominent directory presence.

enrichment.name: Armonía Music Center
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: Classes at Coachella Valley Housing Coalition (CVHC), Coachella, CA (street address not published)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Program operates across multiple Coachella Valley sites as a nonprofit with a distinctive cultural mission, but surfaces only on its own parent-organization page with no authoritative secondary coverage in search results.

enrichment.name: Boys & Girls Clubs of Coachella Valley — Coachella Clubhouse
enrichment.full_address: 85350 Bagdad Ave, Coachella, CA (discovery value; not confirmed by site — site does not publish individual clubhouse street addresses)
enrichment._src_name: Boys & Girls Clubs of Coachella Valley — Coachella Clubhouse

enrichment.name: Youth Leadership Institute — Eastern Coachella Valley
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Well-established statewide nonprofit (100k+ youth served) with active ECV programs since 2018–2019, but only surfaces on own site plus 1–2 aggregator listings for obvious local queries.
enrichment._src_name: Youth Leadership Institute (YLI) — Eastern Coachella Valley

enrichment.name: Desert Preschool Academy – Tlaquepaque
special_programs_if_stated: Child and Adult Care Food Program (CACFP)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Multi-site nonprofit serving 300+ children annually with a clear community mission; search results are dominated by Winnie and Tootris aggregators rather than the org's own content.

enrichment.name: Desert Preschool Academy – Las Casas
special_programs_if_stated: CACFP (Child and Adult Care Food Program)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Serves 300+ children across 10 locations with a 2017 track record, but search results are dominated by aggregators (daycare.com, tootris.com) with no authoritative directory or news coverage surfacing.

enrichment.name: First Step Preschool
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Website is unreachable (ECONNREFUSED); entity surfaces only through aggregators (daycare.com, Winnie, YellowPages, tootris) with no own-site presence in search results.

enrichment.name: Toddler's Academy I, LLC
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Named "2025 Best of the Best" childcare provider with STEAM/bilingual programs but has no standalone website; surfaces only on aggregator listings (daycare.com, Buzzfile) and social media.

enrichment.name: Campesinos Unidos – Coachella (Tyler St)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Nonprofit with 50+ years of community service presence across three counties; the Coachella Tyler St campus surfaces only via third-party directory listings (CMac, Manta) rather than the organization's own site, which omits childcare program details entirely.

enrichment.name: Beltran's Ark Daycare & Pre-School
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: No standalone website exists; presence limited to Facebook page and aggregator listings (Yelp, Nextdoor), leaving the business nearly invisible to agent queries despite apparent active operation.

enrichment.name: It's A Little Scholars Childcare Center
enrichment.license_or_accreditation_displayed: Licensed by the CCLD of the CDSS
special_programs_if_stated: Financial assistance / free childcare for qualifying families
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Center cites 35+ years of experience and bilingual services but surfaces only on its own site and one Yelp listing; no presence on GreatSchools, Care.com, or other authoritative childcare directories.
enrichment._src_name: It's A Little Scholars Childcare Center

enrichment.name: Coachella Football Club
enrichment.ages_grades_served: youth all-ages (post-high school pre-professional pathway noted)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Club appears operationally active with USL2 affiliation and a local community focus, but surfaces only its own site in search — no league directories, local news, or sports aggregators index the youth academy specifically.

enrichment.name: Coachella Youth Sports Association Soccer League (CYSA)
enrichment.full_address: 82217 Miles Ave., Indio, CA 92201 (mailing: P.O. Box 1323, Coachella, CA 92236)
special_programs_if_stated: Competitive pathway/sponsorship program for low-income youth
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Large community organization (1,000+ kids, 115 teams, 501c3, serving multiple Eastern CV cities) but surfaces mainly on its own site and social profiles; no local news or authoritative directory presence in top results.
enrichment._src_name: Coachella Youth Sports Association Soccer League (CYSA)

enrichment.name: Coachella Youth Baseball & Softball Association (CYBSA)
enrichment.full_address: PO Box 1296, Coachella, CA 92236; fields at Bagdouma Park
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established community league with city MOU and active social presence, but website is a generic BlueSombrero portal with minimal content — significantly undersells the organization's local footprint.

enrichment.name: Stars Behavioral Health Group — Oasis Coachella Center
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Surfaces in findhelp.org and Kaiser directories but lacks independent press, community coverage, or Google Business prominence given the scope of services it provides to the eastern Coachella Valley.
enrichment._src_name: Stars Behavioral Health Group — Oasis Coachella Center
